channel.title: NAJR Price, S Mookerjee, E Dyakova, A Myall, W Leung, AY Weiße, Y Shersing, ET Brannigan, T Galletly, D Muir, P Randell, F Davies, F Bolt, M Barahona, JA Otter, AH Holmes | PlatCOVID

item.title: Development and delivery of a real-time hospital-onset COVID-19 surveillance system using network analysis.
